description: Minimal net9.0 console with an unused local (int x;). Proves the qodana-dotnet (Ultimate Rider) image scans .NET end-to-end via the bundled Rider dist (no ReSharper CLT mirror — InspectCode ships in the dist) and emits SARIF with a finding in Program.cs (QD-15042). First e2e for the dotnet image: base + node + eslint + dotnet-toolchain (SDK 8/9/10) + privileged + dist + cli + runtime. network: bridge — a .NET restore can reach NuGet even for a zero-dependency project; the Rider dist is baked, so no tool download.

expectations.reason: The Rider engine must analyze the project and report at least one finding in Program.cs (the unused local `int x;`). Zero findings means the image's .NET SDK + Rider scan path is broken — a real signal, not a fixture to weaken. Selector-less by design: asserts the scan ran and located a result, without pinning a Rider/ReSharper rule id that can vary by build.
